objective: Review the T02 implementation extracting grove-core from the grove binary and rewiring the CLI to consume it via grove_core::.
key_changes: All 9 acceptance criteria independently re-verified against live codebase and toolchain output (not trusted from PROGRESS).
REVISION 1 applied: main.rs imports {ops,registry,fetch,ingest} with no engine; grep engine:: in main.rs is empty.
REVISION 2 applied: core/Cargo.toml serde carries features=["derive"]; required by moved modules' Serialize/Deserialize derives.
5 modules physically moved to core/src/ (git mv); cli/src/ now only init/main/mcp; intra-core crate:: refs target only moved modules.
cargo tree -p grove-core is clap-free (AC#4); clap lives only in the CLI crate.
Dep partitioning clean: no leftover dropped-dep uses in cli/src; all retained deps used; Cargo.lock regenerated with grove-core entry.
Integration tests (cli/tests/cli.rs) spawn the binary via CARGO_BIN_EXE_grove — no crate refs; unaffected by the move; 17 pass.
Re-ran build/test/clippy myself: 134 tests pass (32 cli + 17 integ + 85 core); clippy -D warnings clean; binary still grove 0.1.11.
Advisory only: cli/Cargo.toml serde derive feature technically unused in CLI (only trait bound T: serde::Serialize at mcp.rs:329); harmless, matches plan, no action.
Pure mechanical extraction; no security surface touched; no engine logic rewritten.
